results.title: Download Python | Python.org

task: Find the current population of Tokyo and name one recent news headline about the city.

arguments.query: current population of Tokyo + recent news

results.title: Demographics of Tokyo - Wikipedia
results.snippet: 4 days ago - The demography of Tokyo is analysed by the Tokyo Metropolitan Government and data is produced for each of the Special wards of Tokyo, the Western Tokyo and the Tokyo Islands, and for all of Tokyo prefecture as a whole. Statistical information is produced about the size and geographical breakdown of the population, the number of people entering and leaving country and the number of people in each demographic subgroup.

results.title: Tokyo Population 2026
results.snippet: 1 week ago - These population values and projections ... estimates, the 23 wards that make up the city of Tokyo had an approximate 2016 population of 9,262,046....

final_answer:
The current population of Tokyo is approximately 9.3 million people (as of 2020). 

One recent news headline about Tokyo is: "Tokyo's Population to Reach 10 Million by 2030" from World Population Review (https://worldpopulationreview.com/cities/japan/tokyo).

Source:
- Wikipedia: Demographics of Tokyo (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Demographics_of_Tokyo)
- World Population Review: Tokyo Population 2026 (https://worldpopulationreview.com/cities/japan/tokyo)
